reapack.name: QC_Auto Playback.lua
reapack.desc: Automatcally switch between ruffs and stems track

reapack.name: QC_Cleanup.lua
reapack.desc: Scans all tracks and removes the JS: Volume/Pan Smoother - QC plugin

reapack.name: QC_Organize Audio.lua
reapack.desc: Set up the Ruffs and Stems in an organized structure in Reaper for QC purposes
